arts.ttl: Lyon boss gets 9-month ban for confronting ref
arts.sum: Lyon coach Paulo Fonseca has been suspended for nine months by the French Professional Football League (FLP), following his confrontation with referee Benoit Millot during his team's recent 2-1 Ligue 1 victory over Brest.
